weekly picks (Jul 1 week 2026)

Posted on July 6, 2026 in 2026jul,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 July 1st week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

07/08

  1. s41467-026-75346-5 Two-dimensional pixel-level addressable mid-infrared metasurface spatial light modulator (Nature Communications)

  2. s41567-026-03344-x Topological textures in polar materials (Nature Physics)

  3. s41567-026-03375-4 Visualization of the Zhang–Rice singlet, electronic molecules and Cooper pair formation in a cuprate superconductor (Nature Physics)

  4. s41586-026-10882-0 Publisher Correction: A 98-qubit trapped-ion quantum computer with all-to-all connectivity (Nature)

  5. s41598-026-57525-y Modeling the resilient modulus of railway subgrade material considering the effects of initial stress state under long-term cyclic loading (Scientific Reports)

  6. xdcg-6df5 Nonparametric Learning Non-Gaussian Quantum States of Continuous Variable Systems (PRL)

  7. b16v-hwp2 Spontaneous Quantum Turbulence in a Newborn Bose-Einstein Condensate via the Kibble-Zurek Mechanism (PRL)

  8. v8x8-ft81 Emergence of Universality in Transport of Noisy Free Fermions (PRL)

  9. xkh7-gdqm Entanglement Growth from Entangled States: A Unified Perspective on Entanglement Generation and Transport (PRL)

  10. d3fz-5755 Skeleton of Isometric Tensor Network States for Abelian String-Net Models (PRL)

  11. qprk-k7wn High-Temperature Fermionic Gibbs States are Mixtures of Gaussian States (PRL)

  12. 9mjc-nhxx Noise-Resilient Heisenberg-Limited Quantum Sensing via Indefinite-Causal-Order Error Correction (PRL)

  13. dtd2-4vpn Environment-Assisted Generation of Non-Gaussian Wave-Packet Quantum States (PRL)

  14. 5myp-jksn Black Hole States in Quantum Spin Chains (PRL)

  15. xsdn-srjd Symmetry-Controlled Thermal Activation in Pyramidal Coulomb Clusters: Testing Kramers-Langer Theory (PRL)

  16. j8gx-58hf Metacavity Quantum Electrodynamics (PRL)

  17. 7wtv-p9l5 Realization of Floquet-Engineered Topological Complex-Energy Band Braids in Single-Photon Interferometry (PRL)

  18. 6gn2-2v9b Microwave Vortex Beam Lasing via Photonic Time Crystals (PRL)

  19. vjtv-2prg Spectrally Uniform Continuous-Variable Quantum Microcombs (PRL)

  20. fj29-8l44 Experimental Observation of the Area Rule and Bifractality of Circulation in Three Dimensional Newtonian and Polymeric Turbulence (PRL)

  21. dcn2-lc8k Superconductivity from Phonon-Mediated Retardation in a Single-Flavor Metal (PRL)

  22. xqxt-fmh8 Thermodynamic Evidence for Pressure-Driven Evolution towards Weak-Coupling Superconductivity in Pb (PRL)

  23. v4ky-6v45 Hierarchical Structures of Quantum Geometric Spectrum in Quasicrystals: A Renormalization-Group Study (PRL)

  24. 7cpd-mv33 Quantum Spin Models of Commensurate $p$-Wave Magnets (PRL)

  25. bd1f-jdvh Chemical Symmetry Breaking Enables Interconversion between Altermagnetic and Compensated Ferrimagnetic States (PRL)

  26. jn9y-yfcw Dynamically Re-entrant Skyrmion Phase in Oscillating Magnetic Fields (PRL)

  27. 5m4c-5cwx Geometric Spin Rotation in Triangular Antiferromagnets (PRL)

  28. zxsb-7cj3 Multiferroicity in the Two-Dimensional Limit in Hexagonal ${\mathrm{LuFeO}}_{3}$ Films (PRL)

  29. spsr-xr47 Three-Dimensional Wide-Bandwidth Quantum Energy Truncation Terahertz Coherence Tomography (PRL)

  30. 3ck1-gzzf Mixed Phases in Feedback Ising Models (PRL)

  31. dj1t-tvw6 Supercritical-Subcritical Correspondence, Asymmetric Effects, and Antisymmetric Corrections Near a Critical Point (PRL)

  32. q7dh-ccch Ensemble Time-Dependent Density Functional Theory (PRL)

07/07
